title: Image Overlay Callback v1 (CC3-906)
description: Wire format for the webhook the ieee-rc-image-generator Lambda POSTs to Drupal once an image-generation job reaches a terminal state. Body is signed with HMAC-SHA256 (hex-encoded) using the secret resolved from callback_secret_ref in the trigger; signature lives in X-Webhook-Signature. Drupal updates the corresponding ProductLoadItem's image_transfer_status (and related media_metadata) on receipt — replacing the S3 HeadObject polling loop introduced in CC3-905.

item_id.description: Echoed from the trigger. Drupal loads ProductLoadItem by this id.

request_id.description: Echoed from the trigger. Drupal verifies the item belongs to this request before updating.

operation.description: Constant 'generate_image' so Drupal's WebhookController can multiplex this callback alongside transfer_media / transfer_image.

status.description: Terminal state only. Lambda must not POST 'pending' or 'in_progress' callbacks.

product_part_number.description: Echoed for log/debug context. Drupal already has this on the item.

dest_bucket.description: Required on status=complete. Final S3 bucket the output landed in (with STAGE prefix applied). Stored on media_metadata for audit.

dest_key.description: Required on status=complete. Final S3 key of the rendered image.

bytes.description: Required on status=complete. Size of the rendered image in bytes.

s3_etag.description: Required on status=complete. ETag of the dest object from the PutObject response. Stored for audit.

width.description: Required on status=complete. Pixel width of the rendered image.

height.description: Required on status=complete. Pixel height of the rendered image.

error_code.description: Required when status=error. Machine-readable failure mode. Drupal surfaces a user-facing message keyed off this; 'internal' is the catch-all and should be rare.

error_message.description: Free-text detail. Logged to watchdog and stored on the item's media_metadata. Not user-facing.
